case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. DARRELL NUNNALLY et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2006 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-23-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 218, SUE M KAPLAN FOR PROVE-UP HEARING. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: JIROQUE/DLOK; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, CSR # 3321 (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tina Paxton.
Arnold Evje II, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Jaime Quijano, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Darrell Nunnally.
EXHIBIT 1- Three-Day Notice-------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 34 Sixth Street, #118, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $842.70
Costs $195.00, for the total of $1,037.70.
Counsel stipulated for the return of EXHIBIT.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2006 Off Calendar
